archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Dark Mode Control Room)

headings.description: Used for page titles, modal headers, and main metrics.

body.description: Used for standard text, labels, and descriptions.

numbers_and_tickers.description: MANDATORY for all stock prices, tickers (INTC, AAPL), percentages, and financial data to ensure tabular alignment and a technical feel.
numbers_and_tickers.fallback: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

background.description: Deepest obsidian, tinted with a hint of cool blue. Never pure black.

surface.description: Subtle elevation using slightly lighter tints of the background.

border.description: Grid Borders ('The Technical Look'). 1px subtle strokes to separate components without relying on soft shadows.

brand.description: Electric blue for primary actions (buttons, toggles).

layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Numbers and monetary values right-aligned or strictly structured. Tickers and labels left-aligned. Clear optical alignment.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px border-border, no shadow. Hover: border darkens, slight lift (-translate-y-1).

side_panel_sheet.style: Dark solid background, 1px left border. Header area has glassmorphism if overlapping an abstract image.
side_panel_sheet.ai_prediction_section: Highlight this section with a subtle neon glow or a distinct border to differentiate AI content from raw data.

buttons.primary: Solid brand color, sharp or slightly rounded corners, high contrast text.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px border, text-secondary hover to text-primary.

inputs_and_search.style: Dark background input (#0E1116), subtle border, high contrast white text. Focus ring should be brand accent.

interactions_and_motion.hover: All interactive elements MUST have explicitly defined hover states. E.g., hover:bg-[#151921] hover:text-white transition-all duration-200.
interactions_and_motion.cards: Subtle border color change on hover, no extreme scaling.
interactions_and_motion.data_refresh: Animate numbers briefly (e.g., flash green/red) when data updates.

ai_prediction_bg.description: Abstract data network geometry. Use as a low-opacity (10-20%) background in the Side Panel header or behind the AI prediction cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (e.g., stock-card-{ticker}, add-stock-btn, refresh-btn, side-panel-close).
Implement the layout using a strict 'Control Room' grid layout for the stock cards. No empty spaces.
Install and use Phosphor Icons via 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' for clean, high-end technical iconography.
Load Google Fonts: 'Manrope' (headings), 'IBM Plex Sans' (body), 'JetBrains Mono' (tickers/prices) via standard import.
In the stock card, clearly differentiate USD and MXN prices using size and color hierarchy (USD primary/large, MXN secondary/muted).
The Side Panel must clearly feature 'AI Prediction' with an elevated/premium design feel, using the provided image_url as a background overlay.
Never use pure black or pure white. Follow the provided color hex codes strictly.
Customize tailwind.config.js to include these exact colors and fonts.
